parityMeta.describes: SC-0 i18n/formatters formatTrainingMode snapshot — the one display formatter the recovery/scheduler engines import from src/i18n/formatters that was not yet native (formatMuscleName=AN-3; formatTemplateName/formatExerciseName already ported). formatTrainingMode (formatters.ts:213-214) = lookupLabel(value, TRAINING_MODE_LABELS). The golden reconstructs TRAINING_MODE_LABELS (formatters.ts:85-89) by routing each key through the REAL formatter and freezes branch-covering probes (map hit / lowercase-normalize / already-CJK as-is / CJK non-label fallback / unknown non-CJK -> 未知状态 / '' -> 未知状态). The Swift SchedulingFormatters.formatTrainingMode mirrors the lookupLabel STRING path and re-runs each probe, asserting equality branch-by-branch.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: No input params — the generator imports the REAL formatTrainingMode from src/i18n/formatters.ts, reconstructs TRAINING_MODE_LABELS through it, and runs branch-covering string probes. The consumer nextWorkoutScheduler.ts:409 calls formatTrainingMode only on a truthy string (`trainingMode ? formatTrainingMode(trainingMode) : ''`), so the value is always a string; the object path of lookupLabel is unreachable from that call site and intentionally NOT ported (same scoping as AN-3 formatMuscleName). No engine call, no clock -> generatedAtPolicy 'none'. Generated; never hand-edited (parity contract §22).
